name: Calljmp
description: Code-native agentic backend for building, deploying, and managing AI agents as TypeScript code. Provides agent execution, state management, persistent memory, knowledge retrieval, and evaluation infrastructure. Designed as a dedicated agentic backend alongside app infrastructure.
capabilities: Execute agents as code in TypeScript
Vector and hybrid search knowledge retrieval
Tool integration with vetted APIs and databases
notes: Launched as a production agentic infrastructure platform in early 2026. Combines agent execution, state management, and observability on a managed backend. Designed to keep app backends clean while offloading agent complexity.
